---
title: "Work"
subtitle: "Studies and research software"
listing:
  - id: studies-list
    contents: "studies/*/index.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, description, categories, date]
    categories: true
  - id: tools-list
    contents: "tools/*/index.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, description, categories, date]
    categories: true
toc: false
---

Quantitative and computational work at the intersection of clinical imaging, IBD, and applied AI. The studies are research heading to publication; the tools are software built to support that work, some deployed and in active use, others experiments that earned their place by teaching something useful.

## Studies

::: {#studies-list}
:::

## Tools

::: {#tools-list}
:::
